$comment: llms_txt     - llms.txt or llms-full.txt (purpose-built for LLMs, highest priority)
github_docs  - GitHub repo docs/ folder or README
To add a new provider: add an entry here, then run: npm run crawl -- --provider <name>

statsbomb.description: Event data provider with free open-data repository

opta.description: Stats Perform event data (F24/F7 XML format)

sources.note: No public docs available; compiled from community knowledge

sportmonks.description: REST API for football fixtures, standings, and events

sources.note: Event type mappings and field descriptions

transfermarkt.description: Public football entity pages for players, teams, competitions, matches, transfers, and market values

sources.note: Public website identity surfaces and Reep-derived provider-quirk notes

soccerdonna.description: Public women's football entity pages, match reports, competition pages, player profiles, and staff profiles

sources.note: Public website identity surfaces and Reep-derived women's football matching notes

fotmob.description: Consumer-facing football fixtures, teams, competitions, player profiles, lineups, and match statistics

sources.note: Public website and undocumented endpoint identity-surface notes

impect.description: Commercial football data provider; Packing/pxT metrics, KPI/score framework, detailed set-pieces (Customer API v5)

sources.note: Customer API v5 OpenAPI spec (specs/impect/impect_openapi_docs.yml); Swagger at https://api.impect.com/v3/api-docs/CustomerAPI

skillcorner.description: Commercial broadcast-tracking, physical and Game Intelligence (off-ball runs, on-ball engagements) data provider
skillcorner.version: tracking v3 / physical v3 / dynamic events v2

kloppy.description: Python library for standardising football data across providers

socceraction.description: Python library for SPADL representation and VAEP/xT action valuation

soccerdata.description: Python library for scraping football data from popular websites

mplsoccer.description: Python library for drawing soccer pitches and visualisations with matplotlib

databallpy.description: Python library for loading, synchronising, and analysing tracking and event data

floodlight.description: Python library for spatial football data analysis (tracking, pitch control, metrics)

free-sources.description: Free football data sources (FBref, Understat, ClubElo, football-data.co.uk)

sources.note: Overview and access patterns for free data sources
